name: Six Eared Macaque
description:
S3 || PERSONAL HEADCANON INCLUDED || A price paid for a new life

It's the end of winter's reign. Macaque is stuck with the group due to Mk's insistence on a small "celebration". Yay! The Bone Demon's dead, but scars are deep and fresh. Macaque knows he shouldn't be here.

But maybe that's why it's so appealing to not leave.
creator: Macaquen1
